descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 7-3 to extend Centennial Cup semi-final to game seven.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Red Deer Rustlers 7-3 in a western Centennial Cup semi-final playoff game on April 16, 1987, evening the best-of-seven series at 3-3. The Sockeyes scored five first-period goals and held off a Red Deer comeback, with centre Brian Kozak scoring a crucial shorthanded goal in the third period. Coach Orland Kurtenbach credited improved officiating and Kozak's goal for turning the series momentum.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes extend playoff to the limit
